purpose: Convergent technical roadmap for Formation Medium work. This is an execution queue and scope-control artifact, not a pitch deck, not source-extracted, and not a proof.
operating_rule: Advance only work that improves source completeness, formal/checker support, physical-regime triage, or non-promotion discipline. Do not expand into broad substrate speculation without a registered intake/check target. Before major work, apply the mission-grade critical review doctrine: identify the hard bottleneck, thin-stick dependencies, negative-progress risk, and whether the work is convenience drift. Before tools/source/physics expansion, follow Stage 0 math-first protocol: Tools serve the math plan; tools do not choose the plan.

resource_tiers.budget_profile: current local repo and lightweight scripts
small contractor/advisor budget or limited cloud compute
unlock: targeted source intake by domain specialists

near_term_queue.title: Maintain Stage 0 minimal static formal skeleton and finite witnesses
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Completed: Stage 0 skeleton exists with support-subset Gr_+(1,n)/Gr_+(0,n) finite model, finite witnesses for n=2..8, route-parity checks, toy non-faithful bulk cover, and explicit falsifiers. Next live exit is Stage 1 typed target extraction.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Completion is not theorem status, not final object definition, not source extraction, not physical validation, not substrate selection, and not engineering readiness.

near_term_queue.title: Extract typed formal targets from Stage 0 static skeleton
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Typed definitions and theorem/counterexample targets exist for finite support faces, terminal atom, residue deletion, route parity, toy bulk/readout non-faithfulness, and residue-descent settling; Lean/Lake target skeletons are named but not overpromoted.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Stage 1 typed targets are not proofs, not source extraction, not final Formation Medium definition, not physical validation, and not engineering readiness.

near_term_queue.title: Keep Formation Medium status language synchronized with check results
near_term_queue.exit_condition: No stale SOURCE_GAP/NOT_IMPLEMENTED language remains for already implemented source-coverage guards.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Status synchronization is not theorem progress.

near_term_queue.title: Strengthen machine-readable FM1 constraint schema and validator
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Every FM1 constraint has slot, status, source leads, check targets or blockers, failure mode, and non-promotion boundary.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: FM1 schema validation does not make FM1 physics-checked.

near_term_queue.title: Move surfaceology finite fixtures from polygon chords toward source-faithful surface curve data
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Convex-polygon chord fixture check covers n=4..7 with 30 chords, 56 crossing edges, and 63 maximal-noncrossing witnesses; next exit is source-faithful surface curve data beyond polygon-chord abstraction.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Polygon chord fixtures are not a surfaceology theorem, not full source-faithful surface curve enumeration, and not a positive-region solver.

near_term_queue.title: Plan bounded SMT/typed-predicate model for cosmohedron R12/R13
near_term_queue.exit_condition: A bounded delta-domain/equality-layer fixture plan exists with explicit domain assumptions and expected counterexample policy.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: A fixture plan is not an SMT proof or theorem.

near_term_queue.title: Execute narrow source-intake reviews from PRI-001/PRI-002/PRI-005 queues
near_term_queue.exit_condition: Further physical-regime source-intake review across high-resonance, scattering-native, Route A, CRBSM, and Ising-machine tracks is blocked until STAGE0-FM-MINIMAL-STATIC-FORMAL-SKELETON exists or is explicitly deferred; after that, next exit is a matching SG0-SG4 review for IM-C1/IM-C3 or a direct SN-C3 vs PRI-005 comparison matrix, without flattening roles.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Do not continue physical comparator work by gradient descent/source shopping. Q5 is not source extraction, high-resonance validation, scattering-native validation, Route A implementation, CRBSM validation, Ising-machine validation, physical validation, substrate selection, or engineering readiness, and must preserve role separation without flattening.

near_term_queue.title: Assemble an early technical diligence packet from repo evidence
near_term_queue.exit_condition: A concise packet says what is proven, checked, source-covered, open, and capital/resource-dependent.
near_term_queue.blocked_promotion: Diligence packet is not a pitch claiming engineering readiness.

capital_dependent_queue.purpose: Review source-extracted claims and physical-regime triage for correctness and omissions.
Convert selected source-coverage guards into bounded formal checks or theorem skeletons.
Evaluate candidate physical regimes after source and formal constraints are stable enough to avoid overclaiming.

do_not_do_yet: expand into broad metaphysics without repo check targets
treat source coverage as theorem status
continue major work without mission-grade critical review prework
continue SN-C3/Ising/high-resonance review before STAGE0-FM-MINIMAL-STATIC-FORMAL-SKELETON exists or is explicitly deferred
use tools/source shopping to choose the mathematical plan
resume SN-C3/Ising/high-resonance physical comparison before Stage 1 typed formal targets are stated
treat Stage 0 support-subset finite checks as all-n theorem or source-extracted canonical geometry
success_definition_for_current_phase: A clean repo-backed technical spine that can support disciplined diligence conversations while honestly marking theorem, physics, substrate, and engineering gaps.
static_geometry_spine: Before physical-regime/comparator review claims Formation Medium relevance, score against PRE_SPACETIME_STATIC_GEOMETRY_SPINE SG0-SG4: Gr_+(0,n), Gr_+(1,n), ordered residue signs, Gr_+(1,2)^m product static blocks, and mutation as transported static reflection.
stage0_math_first_protocol: Stage 0 minimal static formal skeleton now exists and passes finite static model checks for n<=8. Next work must move to Stage 1 formal target extraction before further physical/comparator triage.
